🟩 Word Guesser

A tiny, native Android Wordle-style word game. ~72 KB. Android 5.0+.

Download

Download APK (v1.0)

You may need to allow "install unknown apps" for your browser. Verify integrity if you like:
SHA-256: 1b92ade12b437931267abd73baeba2983a9330a95bdcb4c4ddd8098fa4cef74f

Get updates via F-Droid

Add this repository in the F-Droid app and you'll get future versions automatically.

Add to F-Droid

Or add it manually — repository address:

Fingerprint (verify this matches in F-Droid):

How to add manually in F-Droid

  1. Install the F-Droid client.
  2. Go to Settings → Repositories → + (add).
  3. Paste the repository address above.
  4. Confirm the fingerprint matches, then enable the repo.
  5. Search for Word Guesser and install.
